name: mhc_class_I_chr3
description: Zebrafish MHC: non-classical mhc class I cluster on chr3 (mhc1lja, mhc1uea) — secondary expansion. Unlike tetrapods, zebrafish MHC class I and class II are unlinked and dispersed across multiple chromosomes — the canonical 'MHC region' concept does not apply. Each subfamily has 5-30 paralogs with intra-cluster identity 75-95%. High population polymorphism: >100 alleles described per locus.
